functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Choascraft Guide
pages:
Choascraft Guide

A survival guide for the ocean mobs, drops, crafting recipes, armor sets, swords, taming, riding, and netherite upgrades in this pack.

Drop Rules

Most custom mob loot tables roll 1 item per kill. Higher weight means more common. Rare items have low weight.

Shark Drops

Greatwhite sharks and hammerheads drop:
Shark Meat w10
Shark Tooth w10
Shark Fin w6
Shark Hide w6
Shark Eye w1
Their books are mob-specific.

Orca Drops

Orcas can drop:
Orca Bone w10
Orca Meat w10
Orca Tooth w10
Orca Blubber w4
Orca Shard w4
Orca Heart w1
Orca Book w1

Zombie Orca Drops

Zombie orcas use the orca table, but drop Rotten Orca Blubber instead of normal Orca Blubber.

Crab Drops

Crabs can drop:
Crab Legs w10
Crab Claw w8
Crab Shell w8
Crab Eyes w4
Crab Orb w1

Guide Books

Peepers and each jellyfish color now have rare guide books. Greatwhite and hammerhead sharks have separate books with their own facts.

Food and Cooking

Shark and Orca Meat are low food. Crab Legs are edible and can be cooked into Steamed Crab Legs. Furnace recipes: Shark Meat -> Shark Meat Cooked, Crab Legs -> Steamed Crab Legs. Orca Meat Cooked has no recipe found.

Recipe Key

All armor and swords below use a crafting table unless the page says smithing table.

I = iron ingot
. = empty slot

Shark Sword

Pattern:
.T.
FIH
.E.

T=Shark Tooth
F=Shark Fin
H=Shark Hide
E=Shark Eye
Result: Greatwhite Shark Blade

Shark Helmet

Pattern:
III
ITI
TET

T=Shark Tooth
E=Shark Eye
Result: Greatwhite Shark Helmet

Shark Chestplate

Pattern:
IEI
FHF
III

E=Shark Eye
F=Shark Fin
H=Shark Hide
Result: Greatwhite Shark Chestplate

Shark Leggings

Pattern:
III
IEI
IHI

E=Shark Eye
H=Shark Hide
Result: Greatwhite Shark Leggings

Shark Boots

Pattern:
IFI
IFI
ITI

F=Shark Fin
T=Shark Tooth
Result: Greatwhite Shark Boots

Orca Core

Craft an Orca Core with a row of:
Shard - Heart - Shard

This core is used in orca sword and chest recipes.

Orca Sword

Pattern:
.T.
SIC
.B.

T=Orca Tooth
S=Orca Shard
C=Ohow_to_Book.rca Core
B=Orca Bone
Result: Orca Blade

III
ISI
SHS

H=Orca Heart
Result: Orca Helmet

SCS
III

S=Orca Shard
C=Orca Core

Jellyfish Colors

Jellyfish armor comes in yellow, pink, green, and black. Use the matching color jelly for that set.

Jellyfish Helmet

Pattern:
III
IJI
JPJ

J=matching Jelly
P=Jelly Pearl
Result: matching Jellyfish Helmet

Jellyfish Chestplate

Pattern:
IPI
JCJ
III

J=matching Jelly
P=Jelly Pearl
C=Jelly Cyst
Result: matching Jellyfish Chestplate

Jellyfish Leggings

Pattern:
III
IPI
IJI

J=matching Jelly
P=Jelly Pearl
Result: matching Jellyfish Leggings

Jellyfish Boots

Pattern:
IJI
IJI
IPI

J=matching Jelly
P=Jelly Pearl
Result: matching Jellyfish Boots

Netherite Upgrades

Use a smithing table:
Netherite Upgrade Template + base item + Netherite Ingot -> netherite item.

Shark and Crab Netherite

Upgrade Greatwhite Shark Sword/armor and Crab Sword/armor with a template, base item, and netherite ingot.

Orca Netherite

Upgrade Orca Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots with a netherite ingot.

No orca sword smithing recipe was found.

Jellyfish Netherite

Upgrade yellow, pink, green, and black jellyfish armor pieces with a netherite ingot.

Recipe Note

Jelly Sword and Jelly Netherite Sword items exist, but no crafting or smithing recipe was found in the current recipe files.

Systems

Custom swords have durability and Unbreaking support. This pack adds peepers, jellyfish, crabs, orcas, zombie orcas, greatwhite sharks, and hammerheads.

Peepers

Peepers spawn underwater in oceans and rivers, in groups of 3 to 6. They have color and size variants and can breed with kelp.

Jellyfish

A master jellyfish spawner picks black, green, purple, or yellow jellyfish. Jellyfish hurt nearby non-jellyfish mobs with area damage.

Crabs

Crabs spawn on sand and red sand at beaches in groups of 2 to 4. About 1 in 3 natural crabs spawn as babies. They walk, swim, return to land, and attack for 3 damage.

Crab Utility

Ready adult crabs are tempted by rotten flesh. Use rotten flesh on one to make it search sand or red sand for treasure, then wait 30 seconds before feeding it again. Crabs breed with tropical fish buckets. Baby crabs grow faster when fed rotten flesh or tropical fish buckets. Use a bucket on a crab to get a Crab Bucket item.

Orcas

Orcas spawn underwater in ocean biomes in groups of 1 to 2. They can breach, swim in pods, be leashed, and be healed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish.

Orca Taming and Storage

Tame orcas with cod, salmon, or tropical fish. Tamed orcas use saddles, accept chests, breed with salmon, and give water breathing while saddled.

Zombie Orcas

Zombie orcas spawn only in infected oceans. They notice players within 4 blocks, chase up to 10 blocks, have 60 health, attack for 5 damage, and drop the zombie-orca loot table.

Sharks

Greatwhites spawn alone in non-frozen oceans. Hammerheads spawn 1 to 2 in oceans that are not frozen or cold. Zombie sharks spawn in infected oceans, notice players within 4 blocks, chase up to 10 blocks, and have 60 health.

Shark Taming

Greatwhite and hammerhead sharks can be tamed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish. Tamed sharks can be saddled, ridden, chested, and bred with salmon.

Zombie Skins

Tamed orcas and sharks can use Zombie Vial for a zombie skin. Golden apples trigger the cure event back toward the cured look.

Spawn Heights

Most ocean mobs spawn from about Y25 to Y63. Zombie orcas spawn lower, about Y20 to Y55. Crabs spawn around beach height Y60 to Y75.

Quick Progression

1. Hunt crabs, sharks, and orcas for rare parts.
2. Craft iron-tier ocean gear.
3. Use smithing templates and netherite ingots to upgrade.

Rare Parts

Most important rare parts:
Shark Eye
Orca Heart
Crab Orb
Jelly Pearl
Jelly Cyst

These unlock stronger armor and weapons.

End of Guide

Use the ocean, beaches, and deep water to collect each set's materials. Bring food, armor, and a way back to air.
